##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/approve/back 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/approve/back 
 ## 接口描述 
单据审批退回 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E7%9A%84%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"U0000","desc":"%20%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%8F%AF%E4%BB%A5%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7-%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%EF%BC%8C%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%EF%BC%8C%E5%85%B6%E4%B8%AD%E7%9A%84%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7%E8%BF%9B%E8%A1%8C%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"businessList","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%2F%E6%B5%81%E7%A8%8B%E6%80%BB%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AA%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86","maxLength":"1"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"businessId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2025021047250831","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AEid%E4%B8%8D%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E9%87%8D%E5%A4%8D","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"approveCategory","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE","exampleValue":"BILL","desc":"%20%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE(BILL)%2C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E4%B8%BA%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"approveOpinion","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E6%84%8F%E8%A7%81%2F%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E","desc":"%20%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E7%9A%84%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E6%84%8F%E8%A7%81%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E8%BF%9B%E8%A1%8C%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%0A%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E6%84%8F%E8%A7%81%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E4%B8%BA%EF%BC%9A%E6%89%80%E6%9C%89%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%E6%88%96%E8%80%85%E9%A9%B3%E5%9B%9E%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%AF%A5%E5%80%BC%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%EF%BC%8C%E5%90%A6%E5%88%99%E9%9D%9E%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB","maxLength":"255"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"backTypeFlag","label":"%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","maxLength":"10","desc":"%200%EF%BC%9A%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E5%90%8E%E6%97%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%B5%B0%E5%B7%B2%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%EF%BC%8C1%EF%BC%9A%E9%9C%80%E9%87%8D%E8%B5%B0%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%0A%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%EF%BC%9A0","exampleValue":"0"}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","required":true,"exampleValue":"XFT00001","maxLength":"100"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E5%B8%83%E5%B0%94%E5%80%BC%3A%0A%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E4%B8%BAtrue%3B%E6%9C%89%E4%B8%80%E6%9D%A1%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%88%99%E4%B8%BAfalse"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"successKey","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"%5B2022062101309617%5D","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E5%B8%83%E5%B0%94%E5%80%BC%3A%0A%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E4%B8%BAtrue%3B%E6%9C%89%E4%B8%80%E6%9D%A1%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%88%99%E4%B8%BAfalse"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"error","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"null%20%20","desc":"%20%E8%AE%B0%E5%BD%95%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%2C%20%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BAkey%3A%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E3%80%82%E5%BD%93%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%95%B4%E4%BD%93%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%97%B6%2C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%20errorMessage%3A%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/approve/back?OPAUID=XFT00001
```json
{
  "empId": "U0000",
  "businessList":[
  	{
		"businessId": 2022062101309617,
		"approveCategory": "BILL",
		"approveOpinion": "审批通过"
  	}
  ]
}
```
###返回示例
```json
{ 
	   "success":  true,
	   "successKey": [2022062101309617]
	   "error":  null
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 400      | 请联系管理员配置企业信息 | 无                            |
| ERR0000      | 解密失败 | 无                            |
| 400      | 对应的员工信息不存在 | 无                            |

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E7%9A%84%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"U0000","desc":"%20%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%8F%AF%E4%BB%A5%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7-%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%EF%BC%8C%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%EF%BC%8C%E5%85%B6%E4%B8%AD%E7%9A%84%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7%E8%BF%9B%E8%A1%8C%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"businessList","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%2F%E6%B5%81%E7%A8%8B%E6%80%BB%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AA%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86","maxLength":"1"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"businessId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2025021047250831","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AEid%E4%B8%8D%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E9%87%8D%E5%A4%8D","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"approveCategory","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE","exampleValue":"BILL","desc":"%20%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE(BILL)%2C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E4%B8%BA%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"approveOpinion","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E6%84%8F%E8%A7%81%2F%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E","desc":"%20%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E7%9A%84%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E6%84%8F%E8%A7%81%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB
